settings.heading: HOW THEY WEAR IT
settings.body: Layered neutrals, black washed textures, and everyday silhouettes. Use the lookbook as a quick styling direction before shopping the drop.
settings.card_1_text: Start with washed tees, heavyweight blanks, or relaxed upper layers.
settings.card_2_text: Keep the lower half grounded with straight, relaxed, or wide silhouettes.
settings.card_3_text: Muted accessories and low-contrast styling keep the look clean.
